stemHtml: During a low level flight at 2000 ft over the sea, an aircraft approaches an intense area of high pressure. What is correct regarding the aircraft’s altitude with a QNH of 1014 hPa set on the subscale?

options.a: The indicated altitude from the aneroid altimeter will be decreasing.
options.b: The radio altimeter will show a decrease in altitude.
options.c: The aircraft’s true altitude will be increasing.
options.d: The pressure altitude will be increasing.
